versions.version_description: Piano accompaniment chords. Original doesn't really have any accompaniment but it's fun to play with an instrument backing too.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Tabbed by TWAZNBMX
  
Title:Sukiyaki
Artist: 4PM
Album: Now's the Time

Note: original done by Japanese artist Kyu Sakamoto in Japanese!, this is just a cover

Sukiyaki - 4PM


Verse 1

[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]   
It's all because of you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm feeling sad and blue[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
You went away,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
Now my life is just a rainy day [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am7[/ch]
and I love you so,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]B7[/ch]
How much you'll never know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
You've gone away and left me lonely.[/tab]

Verse 2

[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]   
Untouchable memories[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]   
Seem to keep haunting me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Another love so true,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]D7[/ch]
That once turned all my gray skies blue[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am7[/ch]
But you disappeared,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]B7[/ch]
Now my eyes are filled with tears[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G7[/ch]
And I'm wishing you were here[/tab]

Bridge
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]G7[/ch]
With me soaked with love all my thoughts of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Now that you're gone I just don't know what to do[/tab]


Verse 3 (repeat of above chords)


If only you were here,
You'd wash away my tears
The sun would shine,
Once again you'll be mine all mine
But in reality, you and I will never be cos
You took your love away from me.

Chorus

Girl, I don't know what I did to make you leave me
But what I do know is
That since you've been gone there's such an emptiness inside,
I'm wishing you to come back to me.

If only you were here,
You'd wash away my tears
The sun would shine,
Once again you'll be mine all mine
But in reality,
You and I will never be cos
You took your love away from me.
Oh -- Baby you took your love away from me.

http://www.vh1.com/artists/az/4_p_m_for_positive_music_1/artist.jhtml
